recent_examples.quote: Is there a way to email me a quote?
I want you to send me an email. List all of the ways that your company can help me lower my electricity bill or send me a hard copy in the mail.
Well, we just need a quote. We just need a quote for now.
They so we actually have specialists, and they they actually either call you or bring it to you. And then you guys go over it together, and then they just leave you to your decision, I guess.
Yeah. We I mean, we could show you the design over, like, the phone and email if that'd be better for you.
So can you send me a link to my email so I can do some reading on your company?
I wouldn't be able to. I don't have access to anything like that. So, I can maybe request it, but I'm not I'm I don't know for sure what their what their policy is behind that.
Well, I mean, will you be able to send me some program information in the meantime?
